changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE APP_ROLE ( ID NUMBER(10) CONSTRAINT PK_APP_ROLE PRIMARY KEY, NAME VARCHAR2(50) CONSTRAINT NN_ROLE_NAME NOT NULL, DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(200), CONSTRAINT UQ_ROLE_NAME UNIQUE (NAME) )

changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE APP_USER ( ID NUMBER(19) CONSTRAINT PK_APP_USER PRIMARY KEY, USERNAME VARCHAR2(100) CONSTRAINT NN_USR_USERNAME NOT NULL, EMAIL VARCHAR2(200) CONSTRAINT NN_USR_EMAIL NOT NULL, PASSWORD_HASH VARCHAR2(255) CONSTRAINT NN_USR_PWD_HASH NOT NULL, FULL_NAME VARCHAR2(200) CONSTRAINT NN_USR_FULLNAME NOT NULL, ENABLED NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 CONSTRAINT NN_USR_ENABLED NOT NULL, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP CONSTRAINT NN_USR_CREATED NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT UQ_USR_USERNAME UNIQUE (USERNAME), CONSTRAINT UQ_USR_EMAIL UNIQUE (EMAIL), CONSTRAINT CHK_USR_ENABLED CHECK (ENABLED IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE USER_ROLE ( USER_ID NUMBER(19) CONSTRAINT NN_UR_USER_ID NOT NULL, ROLE_ID NUMBER(10) CONSTRAINT NN_UR_ROLE_ID NOT NULL, ASSIGNED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT PK_USER_ROLE PRIMARY KEY (USER_ID, ROLE_ID), CONSTRAINT FK_UR_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES APP_USER (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT FK_UR_ROLE FOREIGN KEY (ROLE_ID) REFERENCES APP_ROLE (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE )

changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN ( ID NUMBER(19) CONSTRAINT PK_PRT PRIMARY KEY, TOKEN VARCHAR2(100) CONSTRAINT NN_PRT_TOKEN NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER(19) CONSTRAINT NN_PRT_USER NOT NULL, EXPIRES_AT TIMESTAMP CONSTRAINT NN_PRT_EXPIRY NOT NULL, USED NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 0 CONSTRAINT NN_PRT_USED NOT NULL, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT UQ_PRT_TOKEN UNIQUE (TOKEN), CONSTRAINT FK_PRT_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES APP_USER (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT CHK_PRT_USED CHECK (USED IN (0, 1)) )
